name: Republic of Formosa (1895)

colors.symbolism: the tiger guarding the country day and night

description: A blue field bearing a yellow tiger at the centre — the "Blue Ground Yellow Tiger Flag" of the short-lived Republic of Formosa.
history: Flag of the Republic of Formosa, an unrecognised state proclaimed on Taiwan on 23 May 1895 after the Qing cession of the island to Japan, and extinguished on 21 October 1895 when Japanese forces took the capital Tainan.
